title: The Birds: Building a City in the Sky
description: Two Athenians escape the city and persuade the birds to build Cloudcuckooland between heaven and earth — blocking the gods' sacrificial smoke.
introduction: Two Athenians escape the city and persuade the birds to build Cloudcuckooland between heaven and earth — blocking the gods' sacrificial smoke.

translation.text: We shall build our city in the sky, between gods and men, and starve the gods of their sacrifices.
